feat.name: Patron's Glamour
feat.text: Gathering up threads of your old connection, you can temporarily disguise yourself as your missing patron. You gain *illusory disguise* as an innate spell of your patron’s tradition, automatically heightened to the rank of your witch cantrips, but you can use it only to disguise yourself as the humanoid representation of your patron. Detection spells of lower rank than this *illusory disguise* give your patron’s information rather than your own.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Auditory
traits.text: Auditory actions and effects rely on sound. An action with the auditory trait can be successfully performed only if the creature using the action can speak or otherwise produce the required sounds. A spell or effect with the auditory trait has its effect only if the target can hear it. This applies only to sound-based parts of the effect, as determined by the GM. This is different from a sonic effect, which still affects targets who can’t hear it (such as deaf targets) as long as the effect itself makes sound.

traits.name: Illusion
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait involve false sensory stimuli.
